gates.evidence: validate-workflow.mjs: 0 failures; all nine production phases present.
validate-pixel-profile.mjs --strict: supported camera, grid, layers, atlas and renderer fields.
Story model preserves recruitment-letter, Victor, overlap, daylight, servant-graves and family-death reveal order; final fact is only added at séance.
Opening states player identity, children, light risk and first action before free exploration; the first curtain changes lighting, actors and portal access.
20-step deterministic route exercises threshold, tuning and evidence mechanics; three permanent state changes affect maps and access.
Five traversable maps, eight route portal crossings, conditional doors and guaranteed return paths; route simulation reaches ending without soft lock.
Four browser screenshots reviewed; tile, actor, portrait and UI atlases use hard pixels and a single 23-color production palette.
Keyboard movement/action/menu/journal plus pointer-based touch d-pad and action button are wired; prompts never depend on color alone.
Unique storyteller-v021-save namespace, automatic checkpoints and JSON state round-trip assertion pass.
Browser HTTP 200, JavaScript syntax check, project contract and production route all pass.
Runtime assets are deterministically generated in-project; AI output is reference-only; product data contains no franchise prompt or copied map dependency.

limitations: 0.21 is intentionally a compact baseline: it proves the pixel-profile production workflow, not the later 0.3 design-library breadth.
Audio is generated as minimal WebAudio feedback rather than a composed score.
Browser screenshots cover representative states; deterministic route simulation covers the complete critical path.
releaseDecision: Accepted as the playable Skill 0.21 baseline at /v021/.
